settingsDesc: Manage your club profile, branding, and account configuration.
slugNote: Slug cannot be changed once set. Contact support to update.
contactNote: These details appear in the player portal footer and on public pages.
logoNote: Upload a logo file (PNG, JPG, SVG, or WebP) or paste a public URL.
customSubdomainDesc: Use your own domain (e.g. golf.yourclub.com) for the player portal and leaderboards.
cnameStep1: Log in to your domain registrar (GoDaddy, Namecheap, Cloudflare, etc.)
cnameStep2: Go to DNS settings for your domain
cnameStep3: Add a CNAME record pointing your subdomain to:
dnsPropagation: DNS propagation may take up to 48 hours. SSL certificate is automatically provisioned once DNS resolves.

certStatus.emailNote: We'll email club admins when HTTPS goes live or fails — you don't have to babysit this page.
certStatus.lastNotifiedActive: Last notified admins: HTTPS active on {{when}}
certStatus.lastNotifiedFailed: Last notified admins: HTTPS failed on {{when}}
certStatus.snoozeEndedBanner: You previously snoozed these reminders until {{when}} — that snooze has now ended, so we're nudging you again.

channels.description: These are the messaging channels available for player notifications and broadcasts. Channels marked inactive are missing required environment variables — no code change is needed once credentials are set.

ghin.integrationDesc: Configure your organization's GHIN API credentials to enable automatic WHS score posting after tournaments. Credentials are encrypted at rest using AES-256-GCM.
ghin.noGhinConfigured: No GHIN credentials are configured. WHS score posting is disabled. Set your credentials below.
ghin.encKeyMissing: Encryption key not configured on server
ghin.encKeyDesc: The ENCRYPTION_SECRET environment variable is not set. Org-level GHIN credentials cannot be stored securely until this is configured by the server administrator.
ghin.encKeyFallback: Server-level credentials are available as a fallback.
ghin.credDesc: Enter your GHIN software credentials. These are the same credentials you use to log in to the GHIN score-posting portal. Contact your USGA/GHIN administrator if you don't have API access.
ghin.connectionTestDesc: Verify your stored GHIN credentials are valid and check how many players in your club have matching GHIN numbers.
ghin.playersWithGhin: {{count}} player in your club has a GHIN number on file.
ghin.playersWithGhin_plural: {{count}} players in your club have a GHIN number on file.

shop.shiprocketDesc: India-first shipping via Shiprocket. Configure credentials in Store Settings.
shop.noProducts: No products yet. Add your first product or sync from Printful.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.deactivateDesc: Temporarily hide your club from the platform. All data is preserved.
danger.exportDesc: Download all your club data (tournaments, members, scores) as a CSV archive.

brandColourDesc: Applied to navigation, buttons, and leaderboard accents across the entire app.
languageNote: Supported languages: English, Hindi (हिंदी), Arabic (العربية). Arabic includes right-to-left layout support.

toasts.rulesConfigSaveFailed: Failed to save Rules Assistant configuration
toasts.brandingDesc: Your brand colour is now applied across the app.
toasts.ghinSavedDesc: Credentials are encrypted and stored securely.
toasts.contactSupportDeactivateEmail: Email support@kharagolf.app to deactivate your club.
toasts.exportDesc: We will email you a download link within 24 hours.

languageDesc: Set the default language for your club. This will be used as the initial language for new player accounts and on the public registration page. Players can override this in their own profile settings.
rulesAssistantDesc: Choose which governing-body wording the AI Rules Assistant uses, and document your club's Local Rules so the assistant respects them when answering players.
rulesGoverningBodyNote: The R&A and USGA share a single set of Rules of Golf, but use different administrative wording and Model Local Rule numbering. Pick whichever your committee follows.
localRulesContentDesc: Document your club's Local Rules and conditions of competition. The Rules Assistant will quote them when applicable. Plain text or Markdown — up to 20,000 characters.
localRulesPlaceholder:
# Local Rules

1. Out of bounds: defined by white stakes along the 7th fairway…
2. Penalty areas: the lake on the 12th is a red penalty area…
3. Cart paths: free relief under Rule 16.1

walletRefundDigestPaused.warningEdited: These recipients are on the suppression list and will be silently dropped on the next run. Add a working address or lift the suppression below.
walletRefundDigestPaused.warningSaved: These recipients are on the suppression list and will be silently dropped on the next run.
walletRefundDigestPaused.saveToastTitle: Saved — but some recipients are paused
walletRefundDigestPaused.saveToastDescription: {{count}} address is on the bounce / unsubscribe suppression list and will be silently dropped on the next run. Review the warnings below.
walletRefundDigestPaused.saveToastDescription_other: {{count}} addresses are on the bounce / unsubscribe suppression list and will be silently dropped on the next run. Review the warnings below.
walletRefundDigestPaused.unsuppressToastRestored: {{email}} can receive digests again and was added back to the recipients list.
walletRefundDigestPaused.unsuppressToastDefault: {{email}} can receive digests again on the next run.

levyLedgerDigestPaused.chipTitle: One or more recipients are on the bounce / unsubscribe suppression list and will be skipped
levyLedgerDigestPaused.panelHeader: Recently paused — these addresses will be silently skipped on the next run
levyLedgerDigestPaused.removeButtonTitle: Remove from suppression list so this address can receive ledger digests again
levyLedgerDigestPaused.fromRunHistoryTitle: Suppression already lifted; the address will receive the next digest if you add it back to the recipients list.
levyLedgerDigestPaused.saveToastTitle: Saved — but some recipients are paused
levyLedgerDigestPaused.saveToastDescription: {{count}} address is on the bounce / unsubscribe suppression list and will be silently dropped on the next run. Review the warnings below.
levyLedgerDigestPaused.saveToastDescription_other: {{count}} addresses are on the bounce / unsubscribe suppression list and will be silently dropped on the next run. Review the warnings below.
levyLedgerDigestPaused.unsuppressToastRestored: {{email}} can receive ledger digests again and was added back to the recipients list.
levyLedgerDigestPaused.unsuppressToastDefault: {{email}} can receive ledger digests again on the next run.

walletTopupRefunds.title: Auto-refunded wallet top-ups
walletTopupRefunds.intro: Every wallet top-up that was auto-refunded by the reconciliation job — useful when a member tells finance their card was charged but their wallet was never credited.
walletTopupRefunds.invalidRangeDescription: The “from” date must be on or before the “to” date.
walletTopupRefunds.refundsEmpty: No auto-refunded wallet top-ups for this filter.

walletRefundDigestSchedule.title: Email this digest to finance on a schedule
walletRefundDigestSchedule.description: Send the auto-refunded wallet top-up CSV automatically each week or month so reconciliation can happen entirely from the inbox — no need to remember to log in.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.recipientsEmpty: Enter at least one email address.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.saveToastEnabled: Finance will receive the next refund CSV automatically.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.saveToastPaused: Schedule paused; no emails will be sent.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.removeConfirm: Remove the wallet auto-refund email schedule?
walletRefundDigestSchedule.previewWaitSeconds_one: Please wait {{count}} second before sending another preview.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.previewWaitSeconds_other: Please wait {{count}} seconds before sending another preview.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.previewWaitGeneric: Please wait a moment before sending another preview.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendNowWaitSeconds_one: Please wait {{count}} second before sending another digest.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendNowWaitSeconds_other: Please wait {{count}} seconds before sending another digest.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendNowWaitGeneric: Please wait a moment before sending another digest.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendNowSentDescription_one: Delivered {{rowCount}} refund row across {{currencyCount}} currency to {{recipientCount}} recipient.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendNowSentDescription_other: Delivered {{rowCount}} refund rows across {{currencyCount}} currencies to {{recipientCount}} recipients.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.languageBanner: Recipients will receive this digest in their own preferred language. External recipients fall back to <lang>{{language}}</lang> — your organization's default.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.languageFallbackWarning: Your org's saved language (“{{configured}}”) is not yet translated for this digest, so the fallback for external recipients is English.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.languageFallbackWarningNoConfig: Your org's saved language is not yet translated for this digest, so the fallback for external recipients is English.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.languagePreviewHint: Use “Send preview” to receive a copy in any of the supported languages at your own inbox before treasurers see it.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.recipientPreferenceMismatchTooltip: This recipient's stored language preference is {{preferred}}, but it isn't yet translated for this digest, so they'll receive {{resolved}} instead.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.previewLanguageTitle: Language to render the preview in. The picker only affects this preview — it does not change the schedule or your org's default language.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.sendPreviewButtonTitle: Email a single-recipient copy of this digest, in the selected language, to your own inbox.
walletRefundDigestSchedule.previewDialogDescription: This is what the next scheduled email would look like if it were sent right now. Nothing has been sent and no run was recorded.

marketingSiteRefresh.notRefreshedYet: Not refreshed yet — the periodic refresh job will re-fetch this within a week.
marketingSiteRefresh.refreshFailed: Couldn't refresh from {{host}} — {{error}}. The cached copy is still being served — paste a new URL above to retry.
marketingSiteRefresh.refreshFailedWithDate: Couldn't refresh from {{host}} — {{error}} on {{when}}. The cached copy is still being served — paste a new URL above to retry.
